message:
feat(cli): enhance session management and context handling

Improve CLI commands for session operations:

- add: Better error messages and validation
- assign: Improve agent assignment with project context
- context: Enhanced context rotation awareness
- dashboard: Add account status indicators
- session: Richer session metadata in listings
- spawn: Better pane targeting and error handling

These changes prepare the CLI for deeper integration with the
new server APIs for checkpoints and CASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
